docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $316.00 FILED BY WINGWO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LU, DIFEI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF WINGWO, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF WINGWO, INC. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE ANITA TO, LOAN PROCESSOR AT WINGWO, INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DIFEI LU. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED TODAY, 9/27/16. SERVICE IS UNTIMELY AS IT WAS EFFECTUATED ON 9/14/16, LESS THEN THE REQUIRED FIFTEEN DAYS PRIOR TO THE HEARING. PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE INFORMED THE CLERK THAT DEFENDANT HAS PAID IN FULL THE OUTSTANDING AMOUNT OWED TO PLAINTIFF WINGWO, INC. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-27-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE ANITA TO, LOAN PROCESSOR AT WINGWO, INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DIFEI LU. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINGWO, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $0.00. SERVED SEP-14-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LU, DIFEI
